# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceMeshConfiguration
metadata:
  name: my-service-mesh
spec:
  proxy:
    # Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection
    resources:
      - services
    annotations:
      linkerd.io/inject: "enabled"
  server:
    # Configure server and authorization policies for services
    port: 4140
    policies:
      - name: my-service-policy
        match:
          - path: "/api/**"
            methods: ["GET", "POST"]
        authorizations:
          - resource: "my-service"
            actions: ["get", "create"]
